summary.original: Explains what Airtable is and how data is structured — bases, tables, fields, records, views, automations, and interfaces. Use when you need context about the Airtable data model.

description.original: Explains what Airtable is and how data is structured — bases, tables, fields, records, views, automations, and interfaces. Use when you need context about the Airtable data model. Official skill document adapted by Agent-OPT as a dedicated bilingual Web skill studio with section navigation, full-text search, and sandboxed source rendering. No upstream executable scripts are executed.
description.zhCN: Airtable 数据模型概览。Agent-OPT 将官方 SKILL.md 适配为独立 Web 技能工作室：支持章节导航、全文检索、中英对照元数据与只读源码呈现；不执行上游脚本，不访问外部账号。

description.original: Rank the pinned skill sections against a bounded user objective and context, then produce an agent prompt, checklist, or reference pack without executing upstream scripts.
Open the full official skill document with structured sections.

description.zhCN: 在 Markdown 标题之间跳转，并按章节查看内容。

notes: In-process skill runtime reads only catalog/skill-bodies/<slug> files prepared at curation time.
